dict.string: Use Face ID to sign in
$(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
TCC
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
Editor
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
Travel Clothing Club may access your media library to provide a more personalized and enjoyable app experience.
Travel Clothing Club may use Bluetooth to connect with nearby accessories or travel devices for a smoother experience.
Travel Clothing Club needs access to your calendar to help you plan and manage your travel schedules easily.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs camera access to take photos for refund requests, profile pictures, and item verification
Travel Clothing Club may access your contacts to help you share travel plans or clothing recommendations with friends.
Travel Clothing Club needs access to your location to provide ride services
Travel Clothing Club needs access to your location to provide ride services
Travel Clothing Club needs access to your location to provide ride services
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs permission to record videos
Travel Clothing Club may use motion data to enhance travel-related features and improve app performance.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs permission to save photos to your library for receipts and order confirmations
$(PRODUCT_NAME) needs photo library access to select images for refund requests, profile pictures, and item uploads
Travel Clothing Club may integrate with Siri to let you manage your travel or clothing preferences using voice commands.
Travel Clothing Club may use speech recognition to enable voice commands for easier navigation and search.
LaunchScreen
Main
